# Paths excluded from the staging -> public promotion train.
#
# One glob pattern per line (bash [[ path == pattern ]] semantics; matched
# against the repo-relative path). Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are
# ignored. Read by scripts/promote-staging-to-public.sh and
# scripts/promotion-drift-report.sh.
#
# Everything merged to staging is public-safe by construction (required
# identity-language + secret-scan merge gates), so this list should normally
# be EMPTY. Add a path here only with a recorded decision explaining why the
# content must not reach the public mirror yet, and remove it when the hold
# lifts.
